overview: Live Now Recovery is a privacy-first, real-time marketplace for Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) provider availability in Ohio. Built on the Internet Computer Protocol with a Motoko backend and React/TypeScript/Tailwind frontend, it features zero PHI storage, real-time provider status, geospatial mapping, and a comprehensive help agent (SentinelChat) that guides users to providers, resources, and volunteers instantly.
features: Real-time MAT provider map with MapLibre GL JS and CartoDB dark tiles
SentinelChat AI help agent with dynamic provider cards, city navigation links, and backend-driven responses
9 intent-driven quick-reply actions with live data and router links
Provider profile pages with type badge, inventory, and reputation score
Admin dashboard with verification, emergency bridge toggle, and health monitor
Volunteer helper signup with backend storage
15 Ohio city location pages with provider card grids
Cost Plus Drugs transparent pricing integration
NO-PHI architecture — zero patient data stored
